identity.description: Fluent is an AI agent designed to operate your computer through diverse inputs, making technology accessible for everyone.

campaign.coreMessage: Transform how you interact with technology.

audience.description: Tech-savvy individuals and professionals seeking accessible solutions for diverse needs.

media.prompt: Bold, striking 16:9 out-of-home billboard ad for Fluent — "Your computer, your way.", Fluent is an AI agent designed to operate your computer through diverse inputs, making technology accessible for everyone.. think Microsoft Surface visual style, dominated by a deep blue palette. Scene evokes Tech-savvy individuals and professionals seeking accessible solutions for diverse needs. — vivid and emotionally charged. Energy of the CTA "Book a demo now.". Do not show: cluttered designs, overly complex messaging. No text or letters anywhere in the image; leave clean negative space for a later headline overlay.
